messages.text: Outstanding work, Agent! You've successfully completed Level 3: Malware Mayhem under intense time pressure. Your rapid cybersecurity response saved the gaming championship!
You demonstrated exceptional skills in the two critical phases: eliminating malicious processes and performing comprehensive malware scans while avoiding false positives.
Your swift action prevented catastrophic damage to the organization's reputation and avoided financial ruin. The tournament can continue thanks to your expertise!
Your performance-based XP reward reflects your speed, accuracy, and efficiency during this high-pressure crisis response. The faster and more accurate you were, the more XP you earned!
Remember: In real cybersecurity incidents, time is everything. Every minute of delay allows attackers to cause more damage, steal more data, and spread further through networks.
You're now ready for the most challenging cybersecurity scenarios. Your proven ability to handle high-stakes, time-critical incidents makes you invaluable to any security team!
A sophisticated malware campaign is hitting the Phalanx Cyber Academy Gaming Championship.
Multiple team systems are compromised by malware disguised as 'ProGamer Boost v2.1' - a fake performance enhancement tool.

🔍 Threat Analysis:
Attack Vector: ProGamer Boost v2.1 trojan deploying 5 malware components
Target: 5 malicious processes + 5 false positives to confuse analysts:
Current Status: 5 critical malware threats active, 5 legitimate programs creating confusion. The ProGamer Boost v2.1 campaign is spreading rapidly through tournament systems.
You're the lead incident responder. The tournament broadcast is in 2 minutes, and we cannot afford system failures on live television.

Every second of delay causes:
• Reputation Damage: -2% per 10 seconds
• Financial Impact: +$5,000 per 10 seconds
• Data Loss Risk: Increases exponentially with each passing moment

🎯 Two-Stage Response Protocol:
Stage 1: Process Termination (1 minute)
Identify and terminate exactly 5 malicious processes using Process Monitor.

Target the 5 malicious processes deployed by the attack:
• Main trojan executable (primary infection vector)
• Cryptocurrency mining process (resource theft)
• Credential harvesting tool (data theft)
• Fake system optimization utility (disguised threat)
• Network worm component (lateral movement)
messages.example:
AVOID killing legitimate processes like:
• Gaming platform clients
• Communication software
• Streaming applications
• Official tournament software
• Web browsers and system utilities

messages.text:
Stage 2: Malware Elimination (1 minute)
Scan and quarantine exactly 5 malware files while avoiding 5 false positives.
CRITICAL: Distinguish real threats from false positives!

⚠️ CRITICAL WARNING - 5 False Positives Present:
• Graphics driver control panel (system utility)
• Tournament streaming software (broadcasting tool)
• Official tournament updater (legitimate software)
• System performance monitor (hardware utility)
• Built-in antivirus software (security component)
messages.example:
Quarantining ANY legitimate file = Major reputation damage!
Only target the 5 actual malware threats from the attack campaign

messages.text:
• Speed vs. Accuracy: 2 minutes total - every decision counts
• Analyze Before Acting: False positives cost precious time and reputation

• Prioritize Real Threats: Focus on confirmed malware, not suspicious-looking legitimate files
• Learn from Mistakes: Each false positive teaches pattern recognition

⚠️ Mission Critical Targets:
• Eliminate exactly 5 malicious processes and 5 malware files
• Reputation: Must stay above 50% (false positives cost 10-15% each!)
• Budget: Cannot exceed $100K in damages

• Time: All systems operational in 2 minutes
• Zero Tolerance: No infected systems can remain active, no legitimate systems damaged

🏆 Perfect Score Requirements:
• Kill exactly 5 malicious processes (avoid 5 legitimate ones)
• Quarantine exactly 5 malware files (avoid 5 false positives)
• Complete both stages within 2 minutes
• Precision Score: Minimize false positives (every mistake costs time and reputation)

🏆 Scoring System:
Base XP Award: 150 XP for completing Level 3 (Intermediate Difficulty)
Accuracy Multiplier: Up to 2x bonus for perfect malware detection (100%)

Speed Bonus: Additional XP for completing both stages within 2 minutes
Precision Bonus: Extra XP for avoiding false positives
Maximum Possible: ~375 XP for flawless malware response!
This is the ultimate test - a 2-minute cyber crisis with global visibility. The gaming community, tournament sponsors, and your team are counting on your analytical skills under extreme pressure.

System Status: Active monitoring enabled
Tools Ready: Process Monitor, Malware Scanner with False Positive Detection
Timer: 2 minutes starting on your command
Remember: Think fast, analyze carefully, act precisely. Are you ready to save the championship?
